payload.subject: Re: Reschedule needed
payload.body:
hi — thanks for the heads up!

here are a couple of times that could work for us:

1. monday, june 30 — morning or early afternoon
2. tuesday, july 1 — anytime
3. friday, july 4 — afternoon

let me know what's available and we'll confirm. thanks!

parsed.rationale: No calendar context was available in the memory slice, so suggested times are placeholder options that the parent must verify before approving.
